event: Rural landscape with willows and farmhouses
description: A subdued landscape showing several rustic farmhouses with thatched and tiled roofs at left, partially hidden behind tall bare willows and other trees. The large willow at right has a thick, gnarled trunk with sparse branches. The ground is green with grass and low vegetation. A tiny figure in red is visible in the middle distance. The sky is overcast in pale grey and cream tones. The palette is predominantly earthy — muted greens, browns, greys, and warm ochres. The brushwork is soft and tonal.

_meta.title: Willows and Farmhouses at Saint Catherine les Arras
